description: Add an audio clip to the Clip field by holding a default audio clip player and clicking.

fields.playback: The playback object that includes data about playtime, duration, position, and playspeed of the audio.
fields.Clip: The AudioClip to play. This can be a StaticAudioClip.

methods.Play: When called, starts playback for this component.
methods.Stop: When called, stops playback for this component.
methods.Pause: When called, pauses playback for this component.
methods.Resume: When called, resumes playback for this component.

usage: Add an audio clip to the Clip field by holding a default audio clip player and clicking. then put the Audio Clip Player into an Audio Output and hit play to hear the audio.
